description: This is the main page component for the Notemaster frontend application. It manages note display, creation, editing, and deletion, integrating with backend API calls and utilizing various child components for UI rendering.

methods.name: loadData
methods.description: Asynchronously fetches notes and tags from the backend API based on current filters and updates the application's state.

methods.name: handleAddNote
methods.description: Handles the creation of a new note by calling the API, then refreshes the notes list.

methods.name: handleEditNote
methods.description: Updates an existing note through the API, then refreshes the notes list.

methods.name: handleDeleteNote
methods.description: Deletes a note after user confirmation, then refreshes the notes list.
